engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This is a motor performance curve showing torque vs. speed characteristics for both intermittent and continuous operation modes. The intermittent mode shows higher torque capacity (28.65 N.m) compared to continuous mode (9.55 N.m at 2000 rpm, 6.37 N.m at 3000 rpm). All axis labels and curve annotations are clearly identified.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸标题栏附近的橙色标注区域，内容为'FINAL TOLERANCE REFERENCE'、'GB/T 1804-m Unit:mm'及线性尺寸范围对应公差值，如'≤6 ±0.1'和'>120~400 0.5'，属于机械尺寸公差说明。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果

抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
